Ready to Order Your Beauty Products?

Contact Dr Lolo Cosmetics today to check product availability, ask for prices, or place your order directly through WhatsApp.

Chat on WhatsAppContact Us

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian beauty and cosmetics brand offering skincare, body care, glow products, oils, serums, creams, soaps, and beauty sets from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam.
